subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the One imprisoned unto the loved ones of God who have believed in Him and in His revealed verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی احباء الله الذینهم آمنوا به و بایاته المنزل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @soul; spirit after death, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
